rationale: Ground truth has no substantive concerns (just an 'lgtm' approval), so both candidates correctly approve with no blockers and both achieve full recall vacuously. Both are well-grounded, citing accurate diff hunks and correctly explaining the upstream vllm#46022 rename rationale and the AttributeError failure mode it fixes. X is slightly more thorough, adding a useful non-blocking note about the mocked tests' limitation for catching future upstream renames, while Y's line-by-line 'Validated' hunk list omits one of the three test-file hunks (the create_audio_generate test) despite its prose correctly noting all three were updated.
